-- This file was generated with Larry Dumper v3.5

local larry1_0 = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local function larry2_0()
  (larry1_0.Character or larry1_0.CharacterAdded:Wait()):WaitForChild("Humanoid").JumpPower = 65
end
larry2_0()
larry1_0.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
  larry2_0()
end)
local larry3_0 = game:GetService("Players")
local larry4_0 = game:GetService("TextChatService")
local larry6_0 = larry3_0.LocalPlayer.Character or larry5_0.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local larry7_0 = larry6_0:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
for larry11_0, larry12_0 in ipairs(larry5_0.Backpack:GetChildren()) do
  if larry12_0:IsA("Tool") then
    larry12_0.Parent = larry6_0
  end
end
wait(1)
larry4_0.TextChannels.RBXGeneral:SendAsync(";ice")
wait(1)
for larry11_0, larry12_0 in ipairs(larry6_0:GetChildren()) do
  if larry12_0:IsA("Tool") then
    larry12_0.Parent = workspace
  end
end
wait(1)
larry4_0.TextChannels.RBXGeneral:SendAsync(";unice")
wait(1)
larry7_0.CFrame = larry7_0.CFrame + larry7_0.CFrame.LookVector * 10
wait(1)
local larry9_0 = larry6_0:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
if larry9_0 then
  larry9_0:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
end
wait(1)
larry7_0.CFrame = larry7_0.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(180), 0)
wait(1)
if larry9_0 then
  larry9_0:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
end
wait(1)
larry9_0.Health = 0
